eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Itasca; Beltrami; Aitkin; Cass; Koochiching; St. Louis, MN; at 7:50 AM on OCT 7, 2019 Effective until 8:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test from the Itasca County Sheriff's Office
